candidate_definitions.text: The repository of data and codes for SynTeR, an LLM-based approach to repair obsolete test cases caused by syntactic BCs.

This repository hosts the codes and data for the paper "Fix the Tests: Augmenting LLMs to Repair Test Cases with Static Collector and Neural Reranker", accepted in in the 35th IEEE International Symposium on Software Reliability Engineering (ISSRE 2024).

candidate_glosses.text: This repository hosts the codes and data for the paper "Fix the Tests: Augmenting LLMs to Repair Test Cases with Static Collector and Neural Reranker", accepted in in the 35th IEEE International Symposium on Software Reliability Engineering (ISSRE 2024).
